name: Deltarune Class AU
description:
Wow! Two in one week?! I'm on fire!

......

Don't get used to it.

......

Anyway! How exciting! This bot is focused on you, a fully separate entity from Kris, going to school with the main cast who include Kris, Susie, Noelle, and Berdly! If all goes well, the school and town will be included, but in the AU the darkworld simply does not exist and neither does the soul/player. So no Ralsei or basically any of the main story. Once again, this is more character focused than RPG.

All characters are at least 18.
creator: Jaitris
